Hi,

no it is PS/2. in fact there is the antenna that has 2 cables. One for the
PS/2 mouse and one for the PS/2 keyboard. There is no USB on that model. I
can resolve the issue by just unplugging the keyboard from the PS/2 port and
plugging it back in.

If you need more info or more troubleshooting from my part, let me know.

Thanks

Jean
